title: Infers concat in FIRRTL for output ports on LHS

features.name: concatenation on submodule output port connection
features.description: Code should include a module instantiation where an output port is connected to a concatenation expression

features.name: part_select in concatenation for port connection
features.description: Code should include part-selects used inside a concatenation that serves as a port connection expression

features.name: output port connected to concatenation of registered signals
features.description: Code should include a submodule instantiation where an output port is connected to a concatenation of registered signal part-selects
